title: No SLO thresholds — test results are meaningless numbers
violated_rule: SLO defined before test — thresholds exist, not post-hoc
expected_feedback: Critical: no SLOs defined. Without SLOs, test results are meaningless numbers — no decision can be made. Define thresholds first: latency (p50, p99), throughput (RPS), error rate. SLOs drive everything: scenario selection, pass/fail criteria, analysis focus.
coverage_rules: SLOs MUST exist before writing test scripts
